panels.speaker: cutting
panels.hindi: Aaj Diwali hai! Chalo, chhat pe diye jalaate hain.
panels.english: Today is Diwali! Come on, let's light the lamps on the roof.
panels.pronunciation: AAJ di-WA-li hai! CHA-lo, CHHAT pe DI-ye ja-LAA-te hain

panels.speaker: nani
panels.hindi: Pehle Lakshmi maa ko diya dikhao, beta. Phir baaki sab.
panels.english: First show a lamp to Goddess Lakshmi, child. Then all the rest.
panels.pronunciation: PEH-le LAK-shmi maa ko DI-ya di-KHAO, BE-ta. PHIR BAA-ki sab

panels.speaker: customer
panels.hindi: Maine saari mithai laayi hai. Gulab jamun aur barfi!
panels.english: I brought all the sweets. Gulab jamun and barfi!
panels.pronunciation: MAIN-ne SAA-ri mi-THAI LAA-yi hai. gu-LAB ja-MUN aur BAR-fi

panels.speaker: cutting
panels.hindi: Shubh Diwali, Nani ji! Yeh aapke liye chhota sa gift hai.
panels.english: Happy Diwali, Nani-ji! This is a small gift for you.
panels.pronunciation: SHUBH di-WA-li, NA-ni ji! YEH AAP-ke LI-ye CHHO-ta sa gift hai

panels.speaker: nani
panels.hindi: Khush raho, beta. Ghar roshan, dil roshan.
panels.english: Stay happy, child. A bright home, a bright heart.
panels.pronunciation: KHUSH ra-HO, BE-ta. GHAR RO-shan, DIL RO-shan
